tool_args.label: Staff Summary - Furnish and Deliver 224 Low-Floor 60-Foot Diesel Buses

payload.title: Staff Summary
payload.description: NYCT procurement staff summary for contract to furnish and deliver 224 low-floor 60-foot diesel buses from New Flyer of America Inc.

tool_args.label: New Flyer of America Inc.
tool_args.raw_text: Vendor Name New Flyer of America Inc. Contract No. B40715 Description Furnish and Deliver 224 Low-Floor 60-Foot Diesel Buses

tool_args.raw_text: NYC Transit Department of Buses ("DOB")

tool_args.label: MTA
tool_args.raw_text: Should the MTA choose to exercise any of these 425 option Buses, Board approval will be obtained prior to award.

tool_args.label: Nova Bus US Inc.
tool_args.raw_text: Nova Bus US Inc. ("Nova Bus")

tool_args.label: NYC Transit Department of Buses
tool_args.raw_text: Selection Committee ("SC") members were drawn from NYC Transit Department of Buses ("DOB")

tool_args.label: MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights (DDCR) has established a zero percent M/WBE and zero percent SDVOB goals on this contract

payload.entity_name: MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights

tool_args.label: Contract B40715 - Furnish and Deliver 224 Low-Floor 60-Foot Diesel Buses

payload.project_name: Furnish and Deliver 224 Low-Floor 60-Foot Diesel Buses
payload.description: Procurement of 224 low-floor 60-foot diesel buses from New Flyer of America Inc. with options for up to 446 additional buses, including spare parts, special tools and equipment, diagnostic testing, technical documentation, and training.

warnings: project.agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Agency names should link to entity records when supported. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.implementing_agency is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Implementing agency is relation context. Suggested relation: implemented_by.
project.publisher is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Publisher is an entity relation, not a project enum. Suggested relation: published_by.

tool_args.label: Board resolution authorizing RFP for up to 1,729 buses

payload.description: On February 22, 2022, the Board adopted a resolution authorizing the use of the competitive Request for Proposals (RFPs) in lieu of competitive bidding to award contracts for the purchase of up to 1,729 buses, which included 245 low-floor 60-foot Buses for NYC Transit.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

payload.description: The solicitation was advertised in August 2022, at which time six bus manufacturers were directly contacted.
Pre-proposal conference held on September 8, 2022, attended by New Flyer and Nova Bus.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

payload.description: Initial proposals were received on December 15, 2022, from New Flyer and Nova Bus.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

payload.description: Oral Presentations were held in January 2023.

tool_args.label: Negotiations with New Flyer and Nova Bus

payload.description: Negotiations were conducted between March and October 2023, centered on cybersecurity, pricing, delivery, alternate proposals, exceptions/deviation/clarifications to technical specifications, and terms and conditions.

issues: evidence_refs must include at least one source block
event payload must include at least one of: event_kind, date_text, date, event_date, description

payload.description: Pilot buses are scheduled to be provided to NYC Transit in January 2025. Four pilot buses will be built by New Flyer to expedite delivery.

warnings: event.organizers is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Organizer lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: organized_by.
event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

payload.description: Balance of 220 buses scheduled to begin delivery in August 2025 and be completed in November 2027, for an overall period of 45 months from Notice of Award.

warnings: event.participants is relation context, not a closed enum or identity key. Participant lists refer to entity records. Suggested relation: has_participant.

payload.description: New Flyer's Best and Final Offer (BAFO) for up to 245 Buses was received on October 20, 2023, in the total amount of $295,756,218.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

payload.description: Nova Bus withdrew its proposal prior to submitting a Best and Final Offer (BAFO) as it decided to close its US manufacturing facility.
When New Flyer was notified of its selection for award, it offered a unilateral price concession of $1 million, which could be applied to one bus.
Delivery schedule is based on the assumption that Notice of Award will be issued on or before January 31, 2024.

warnings: event.event_date is accepted as passthrough, but prefer date_text. Event date literal.

tool_args.label: Total estimated base award amount
tool_args.raw_text: The base award will be in the total estimated amount of $266,751,238

payload.description: Total estimated base award amount for 224 low-floor 60-foot diesel buses (with $1 million price concession applied)
payload.context: Base award for 224 buses with price concession

tool_args.label: Option for 21 additional buses amount
tool_args.raw_text: $24,926,538 Option for 21 Additional Buses

payload.description: Estimated amount for option to purchase up to 21 additional buses

tool_args.label: Option for up to 425 additional buses
tool_args.raw_text: two Options to purchase up to 446 Additional Buses ... Option 2 for up to 425

payload.description: Option 2 to purchase up to 425 additional buses, may be included in 2025-2029 Capital Plan

tool_args.label: New Flyer BAFO amount for up to 245 buses
tool_args.raw_text: New Flyer's BAFO for up to 245 Buses was received on October 20, 2023, in the total amount of $295,756,218

payload.description: New Flyer's Best and Final Offer for up to 245 buses

tool_args.label: Final award amount: 223 buses at $1,186,978 per bus

payload.description: Price per bus for 223 of the 224 base buses

tool_args.label: One bus at reduced price
tool_args.raw_text: $186,978 for one Bus

payload.description: Price for one bus (with $1 million price concession applied)

tool_args.label: Qualification testing, diagnostic tools, manuals
tool_args.raw_text: $434,411 for qualification testing, diagnostic tools, and manuals

payload.description: Amount for qualification testing, diagnostic tools, and manuals

tool_args.label: Training classes
tool_args.raw_text: $991,718 for an estimated quantity of training classes

payload.description: Estimated cost of training classes

tool_args.label: Capital spares amount
tool_args.raw_text: $442,037 for capital spares

payload.description: Amount for capital spares

tool_args.label: New York State Content commitment
tool_args.raw_text: New Flyer has committed to meeting a total New York State Content for the Buses of $51,130,621, which represents 17.32 percent of the total award amount for 224 Buses.

payload.description: New York State Content commitment

tool_args.label: Contract term
tool_args.raw_text: 119 Months from Notice of Award

payload.description: Contract term inclusive of delivery of 245 buses and provision of warranty support

tool_args.label: Total buses in base contract
tool_args.raw_text: 224 Buses

payload.description: Number of buses awarded in the base contract (reduced from 245 due to budget constraints)

tool_args.label: 100% MTA funding
tool_args.raw_text: This contract will be funded with 100 percent MTA funds. Funds for this procurement have been approved in the MTA 2020–2024 Capital Programs.

payload.claim_text: This contract will be funded with 100 percent MTA funds. Funds for this procurement have been approved in the MTA 2020–2024 Capital Programs.

tool_args.label: Zero percent M/WBE and SDVOB goals
tool_args.raw_text: The MTA Department of Diversity and Civil Rights (DDCR) has established a zero percent M/WBE and zero percent SDVOB goals on this contract as, historically, there has been limited M/WBE attainment due to the lack of subcontracting availability.

payload.claim_text: zero percent M/WBE and zero percent SDVOB goals on this contract as, historically, there has been limited M/WBE attainment due to the lack of subcontracting availability

tool_args.label: Buses to replace aging buses at end of 12-year useful life
tool_args.raw_text: These Buses will be purchased to replace aging buses that have reached the end of their 12-year useful life and will operate out of NYC Transit depots located in Brooklyn, Queens, Manhattan, and the Bronx.

payload.claim_text: These Buses will be purchased to replace aging buses that have reached the end of their 12-year useful life and will operate out of NYC Transit depots located in Brooklyn, Queens, Manhattan, and the Bronx.

tool_args.label: Selection Committee unanimously recommended New Flyer
tool_args.raw_text: The SC reviewed the BAFO in accordance with the evaluation criteria and unanimously recommended an award to New Flyer because it affords NYC Transit the Best Value.

payload.claim_text: The SC reviewed the BAFO in accordance with the evaluation criteria and unanimously recommended an award to New Flyer because it affords NYC Transit the Best Value.

tool_args.label: New Flyer cybersecurity commitment
tool_args.raw_text: New Flyer has not committed to all of the MTA's cybersecurity requirements but has agreed to review its cybersecurity framework to continuously improve its cybersecurity protections throughout the term of the contract.

payload.claim_text: New Flyer has not committed to all of the MTA's cybersecurity requirements but has agreed to review its cybersecurity framework to continuously improve its cybersecurity protections throughout the term of the contract.

tool_args.label: New Flyer certified no business in Russia
tool_args.raw_text: New Flyer has certified that pursuant to EO 16, it is not conducting business in Russia.

payload.claim_text: New Flyer has certified that pursuant to EO 16, it is not conducting business in Russia.

tool_args.label: Price determined fair and reasonable
tool_args.raw_text: Procurement, DOB, and NYC Transit's Cost Price Analysis Unit have determined the final price to be fair and reasonable.

payload.claim_text: Procurement, DOB, and NYC Transit's Cost Price Analysis Unit have determined the final price to be fair and reasonable.

tool_args.label: Total Amount stated in summary
tool_args.raw_text: Total Amount: $291,677,776 (245 Total Buses)

payload.description: Total amount including base and exercised option 21 buses
payload.context: 245 total buses ($266,751,238 Base of 224 Buses + $24,926,538 Option for 21 Additional Buses)

payload.description: New Flyer of America Inc. is the vendor awarded Contract B40715 to furnish and deliver 224 low-floor 60-foot diesel buses
